test_framework: No test framework found - project uses manual testing
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent && npx tsc -b && npx vite build
verification_instructions: Run TypeScript compilation to check for type errors
environment_constraints: No test framework. Verify by running tsc type checks and vite build.
contribution_requirements: Work directly on main branch, commit and push to main
key_patterns: Components in src/components/, game logic in src/utils/gameLogic.ts, state in src/store/gameStore.ts, CSS in src/App.css (single minified file), i18n in src/i18n/en.ts and es.ts, figure images in src/utils/figureImages.ts. Types in src/types/game.ts. Icons as SVG components in src/components/Icons.tsx. ClanShield in src/components/ClanShields.tsx.
directory_structure: src/components/ - React components, src/store/ - Zustand store, src/utils/ - game logic, src/types/ - TypeScript types, src/i18n/ - translations, src/img/ - images, src/App.css - all styles
